NL EN DE

Boerderij Voorste Eng
Edeseweg 2, Otterlo

Discover Otterlo & The Veluwe

Otterlo is the pearl of the Veluwe. Boerderij Voorste Eng is the ideal base for exploring the beautiful nature, culture, and history of Gelderland.

Dining & Drinks

Dining at Koe

Welcome to KOE, a unique dining experience in Otterlo. Located in a stylishly renovated cowshed at Hoeve Boer & Bleek, KOE offers a cozy venue surrounded by meadows and forests.

Brasserie Otterlo

Located in the heart of Otterlo, the ideal hotspot for a fresh cup of coffee, lunch, or dinner. Our chefs give Burgundian French dishes a modern twist.

Eetcafé de Driester

A staple in the village since 1997, located next to the church. Typical Dutch menu for lunch and dinner, where quality and coziness are paramount.

Restaurant de Waldhoorn

Historical meeting place with multiple terraces and a courtyard. Casual enjoyment on the terrace, summer and winter.

Restaurant Cèpes

A unique culinary experience rooted in our passion for local, seasonal ingredients from the Veluwe.

De Wever Lodge

With a good glass of wine at the Bistro bar, you quickly feel at home. Artisanal dishes made with seasonal ingredients.

Brasserie Roekel

Located in the middle of the Mossel nature reserve. The perfect pit stop during your walk or bike ride, with views of nature.

‘T Smulhuis

Hospitality and enjoyment are central here. Our restaurant offers dishes inspired by both Asian and Western cuisine.

Tea Room De Mossel

Located on a dirt road in the middle of nature. Enjoy a snack and drink on the terrace or in the tea room. Accessible by foot, bicycle, or horse.
🍦

Ice Cream Spots!

Ice Cream from Co Hoenderloo

The tradition of our artisanal vanilla ice cream has existed for over 75 years. Freshly scooped daily at our ice cream counter.

Ice Cream Parlor PURO Ede

Pure enjoyment with authentically prepared ice cream from our Cattabriga Effe6 freezers, made with the freshest ingredients.

Ice Cream Parlor Bernado’s Ede

Known for years in Ede, with over 80 flavors of artisanal, daily-made fresh ice cream. Also special options for diabetics and allergies.

Activities & Sightseeing

National Park De Hoge Veluwe

One of the most beautiful nature reserves in the Netherlands, perfect for exploring on foot, by bike, or by car.

St. Hubertus Hunting Lodge

The former country residence of the Kröller-Müller couple, and one of the most iconic buildings in the Netherlands, designed by Berlage.

Museonder

The first underground museum in the world in the center of the Park. Discover what lives and lived underground on the Veluwe.

Kröller-Müller Museum

The most beautiful Van Gogh collection in the world, including masterpieces of modern masters and an extensive impressive sculpture garden.

Dutch Tile Museum

The largest and most versatile collection of Dutch wall tiles from the late Middle Ages, historically important for Dutch design.

Walking tips around Otterlo

High sand dunes and heathland

Impressive shifting sand dune with woods on one side and heath and mosses on the other. Beautiful walking area just outside Otterlo.

Read more

Big 5 walking route

Walking route that crosses the sand dune, featuring wooden statues of wild Veluwe animals scattered along the route.

Read more

Klompenpad Eeskooterpad

A beautiful 15 km circular walk through farmland, past farmyards, heathlands, and through the Otterlo Forest.

Read more

Walking tip Ede municipality

View the specific route for Otterlo, Mossel, and Roekel via the walking blog of the Ede municipality.

Read more

Surroundings (Further afield)

Paleis het Loo Apeldoorn

Original 17th-century palace of the House of Orange. Admire the furnished rooms, impressive gardens, and the royal stables.

The Netherlands Open Air Museum Arnhem

You can view history from all sides here. Breathtaking buildings, objects, and stories up to four hundred years old from all over the Netherlands.
